summary: The user requested assistance in calculating statistical measures from a frequency distribution of daily wages for a group of 200 persons, using a transformation of the variable X. The calculations included the median, lower and upper quartiles, 3rd decile, and 98th percentile, with specific values derived through interpolation.
facts: The user analyzed a frequency distribution of daily wages for a group of 200 persons. The transformation used was U = (X - 130) / 20. The median was calculated to be 136.25. The lower quartile was found to be 127.67. The upper quartile was determined to be 134. The 3rd decile was calculated as 131.67. The 98th percentile was found to be 128.33. The cumulative frequency distribution was constructed based on the values of U and the number of persons in each category.
